milestones.name: OpenSearch foundation
milestones.goal: Stand up the local search infrastructure with OpenSearch ML support, embedding bootstrap, and strict mappings.

milestones.name: Staged ingestion
milestones.goal: Normalize the Kaggle company data into a validated Parquet stage and load it into OpenSearch with repeatable seed and sync flows.

milestones.name: Search API
milestones.goal: Ship the deterministic FastAPI search surface for the UI, including health endpoints, query planning, and facet aggregation.

milestones.name: UI
milestones.goal: Provide a minimal static interface for search, filtering, sorting, pagination, and empty-state handling.

milestones.name: Intelligent search
milestones.goal: Add the Ollama-backed LangChain agent, hybrid retrieval, vectorization, fallback behavior, and observability.

milestones.name: Tagging system
milestones.goal: Keep tags outside the core company index and add scoped tag storage, suggestion generation, and API hooks.

tasks.title: Create repository skeleton
tasks.outcome: The repo has the baseline directory structure required for API, ingestion, search, infrastructure, UI, docs, and tests.

tasks.title: Add Docker Compose stack
tasks.outcome: Docker Compose defines OpenSearch, OpenSearch Dashboards, Ollama, API, and web services with persistent volumes and network wiring.

tasks.title: Enable OpenSearch ML Commons for local embeddings
tasks.outcome: The OpenSearch service enables local ML Commons execution and safe local resource thresholds required for text embedding.

tasks.title: Add service health checks and startup ordering
tasks.outcome: The local stack waits on OpenSearch, Dashboards, and Ollama readiness before dependent services attempt to start.

tasks.title: Add Makefile workflow commands
tasks.outcome: The repo has standard commands for bootstrapping infra, pulling the Ollama model, seeding data, syncing data, and running tests locally.

tasks.title: Create cluster settings bootstrap script
tasks.outcome: A bootstrap script waits for cluster health and applies the ML Commons cluster settings required for local development.

tasks.title: Create embedding model registration and deployment scripts
tasks.outcome: Bootstrap scripts register the embedding model group, register the embedding model, deploy it, and cache the Ollama model locally.

tasks.title: Create ingest pipeline, search pipeline, strict template, and synonyms
tasks.outcome: The index template enforces strict mappings, default embedding ingestion, synonym-aware search analysis, and hybrid score blending.

tasks.title: Define canonical company schema
tasks.outcome: A single normalized company model defines required fields, validation rules, and API-safe field names, excludes unsupported source fields such as type, and keeps tags out of the base company schema.

tasks.title: Build configurable CSV reader
tasks.outcome: The ingestion code can read the Kaggle CSV, apply a configurable row limit or file subset, and map source columns into the canonical staging shape.

tasks.title: Normalize location and numeric fields
tasks.outcome: The normalization pipeline cleans nulls, parses locality into structured location fields, repairs malformed years, and coerces employee counts into consistent numeric values.

tasks.title: Generate stable company identifiers and semantic text
tasks.outcome: Every normalized company record has a stable company_id, preserves a canonical domain for exact matching, and generates a company_semantic_text field from name, industry, normalized locality, and optional founded-year language for embeddings, with the field mix to be revisited after inspecting the real dataset.

tasks.title: Write staged Parquet output
tasks.outcome: Normalized records are written to a deterministic Parquet artifact that can be reused for bulk indexing without reparsing the raw CSV.

tasks.title: Emit validation and dead-letter artifacts
tasks.outcome: Rejected rows are preserved with failure reasons and the ingestion run emits a machine-readable validation summary.

tasks.title: Implement seed flow with alias swap
tasks.outcome: A seed command applies the template, creates a write index, bulk indexes staged records through the default pipeline, and swaps aliases safely.

tasks.title: Implement incremental sync flow
tasks.outcome: A sync job can upsert changed companies idempotently, skip unchanged embeddings when possible, and soft-delete missing records when enabled.

tasks.title: Scaffold FastAPI application and runtime settings
tasks.outcome: The API service can start with central configuration for OpenSearch, Ollama, aliases, tracing flags, and environment-specific defaults.

tasks.title: Define request and response contracts
tasks.outcome: The API enforces typed request payloads and consistent response envelopes for search, facets, health, and readiness.

tasks.title: Implement deterministic query planner
tasks.outcome: A pure function extracts query filters, expands industry synonyms, and produces a deterministic search plan without using Ollama.

tasks.title: Implement lexical and facet query templates
tasks.outcome: Reusable builders generate filtered BM25, exact-boost, sort-aware, and aggregation query bodies against the read alias.

tasks.title: Build deterministic search service
tasks.outcome: The API can turn planner output into OpenSearch requests, map results into response items, and preserve stable pagination metadata.

tasks.title: Expose POST /search
tasks.outcome: The UI-facing search endpoint executes only the deterministic planner path and returns the shared search response schema.

tasks.title: Expose POST /facets
tasks.outcome: The UI-facing facets endpoint returns deterministic aggregations for industry, size, geography, and year-founded filters.

tasks.title: Expose /health and /readiness
tasks.outcome: The API reports process liveness, OpenSearch connectivity, index readiness, and agent dependency status without blocking the UI path.

tasks.title: Create static UI shell
tasks.outcome: The UI has a search input, filter region, sort control, pagination area, and result container laid out for desktop and mobile.

tasks.title: Implement client-side search state
tasks.outcome: The browser stores query text, selected filters, current page, and selected sort in a single state model.

tasks.title: Wire debounced /search requests
tasks.outcome: Typing in the search box triggers debounced API calls, shows loading state, and handles request failures cleanly.

tasks.title: Render result cards and empty states
tasks.outcome: Results show the core company fields, score, and match reasons, while empty and error states remain explicit and readable.

tasks.title: Wire facets, pagination, and sort controls
tasks.outcome: The UI can fetch facet buckets, apply filters, change sort order, and paginate without losing current search state.

tasks.title: Serve the static UI locally
tasks.outcome: The local stack can serve the static UI alongside the API with a single developer command.

tasks.title: Add Ollama runtime configuration
tasks.outcome: The application can target a configurable Ollama base URL and model name, with sane defaults for local development.

tasks.title: Automate Ollama model pull
tasks.outcome: A repeatable script starts Ollama if needed, waits for readiness, and caches the local model required for agent requests.

tasks.title: Create LangChain search agent
tasks.outcome: The agent is configured with ChatOllama, a search-specific system prompt, and an execution path that can call search tools.

tasks.title: Implement agent tool set
tasks.outcome: The agent can invoke lexical search, hybrid search, and facet retrieval tools with typed arguments and deterministic OpenSearch execution.

tasks.title: Add tool-call error middleware
tasks.outcome: Tool failures are returned to the agent as structured tool messages rather than uncaught exceptions.

tasks.title: Add Ollama health probe and fallback gate
tasks.outcome: Agent requests check Ollama reachability up front and route directly to the deterministic planner when Ollama is down or times out.

tasks.title: Expose POST /agent/search
tasks.outcome: The agent endpoint returns the same response shape as /search plus explicit agent_path and fallback_used flags.

tasks.title: Define semantic embedding field and validate ingest simulation
tasks.outcome: The embedding source text is stable and the ingest pipeline can be verified with _simulate before real indexing runs.

tasks.title: Implement hybrid BM25 plus neural retrieval
tasks.outcome: Hybrid retrieval combines exact boosts, full-text matching, explicit filters, and vector search with predictable score normalization.

tasks.title: Handle zero-result agent responses
tasks.outcome: The agent returns a structured no-results response with a clear explanation and suggested query refinements instead of a silent empty list.

tasks.title: Add search and agent observability
tasks.outcome: The system records request IDs, latency, zero-results, fallback activations, tool calls, OpenSearch timings, and optional LangSmith tracing.

tasks.title: Select separate tag storage strategy
tasks.outcome: The tagging system chooses a storage backend outside the core company index and records the rationale for that separation.

tasks.title: Define scoped tag schema
tasks.outcome: Tags are modeled with company_id, tag value, source, created_by, and user or team scope fields needed for multi-tenant ownership.

tasks.title: Create tag storage objects and access layer
tasks.outcome: A separate tag repository can persist, update, and list tags without changing the base company index schema.

tasks.title: Generate tag suggestions during ingestion
tasks.outcome: The ingestion pipeline emits candidate tags derived from normalized industries, locations, and semantic company attributes, while keeping those tags outside the core company index and base company schema.

tasks.title: Add tag APIs and search enrichment hook
tasks.outcome: The system can create, list, and delete scoped tags and optionally attach tag metadata to company search results without reindexing companies.
